title: Is Saudi Arabia calling the shots? Crown Prince MBS urging Trump to keep Iran war alive - report
content: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman is reportedly urging US President Trump to escalate military action against Iran, viewing it as a chance to reshape the Middle East.  He believes removing Iran's current government is key to addressing the threat to Gulf nations.  However, Riyadh officially denies pushing for war, emphasizing a peaceful resolution and self-defense against Iranian attacks.

title: 'US will never give up the Moon again': Nasa plans lunar base, n-powered spacecraft to Mars
content: NASA unveiled ambitious initiatives to accelerate its return to the Moon, aiming for a lunar landing by the end of President Trump's term and establishing a long-term presence. The agency's updated Moon strategy focuses on a phased approach to building a lunar base, incorporating commercial and international partnerships to support frequent crewed missions and sustained human operations.

title: 'Kill network': China sees red as Japan deploys upgraded long-range Type-12 missiles
content: China's PLA has condemned Japan's planned deployment of upgraded Type-12 missiles, warning of a "kill network" targeting coastal and inland areas. This move, aimed at deterring China in a Taiwan conflict, expands Japan's long-range strike capabilities, raising regional tensions.

title: Decoding DhuranDHAR Derangement Syndrome: Bollywood finally learns the art of myth-making
content: From agitprop accusations to civilisational storytelling: why Dhurandhar duology has struck such a nerve...

title: Google president Ruth Porat may have just agreed with Elon Musk’s ‘big AI worry’
content: Tech leaders like Google's Ruth Porat and Elon Musk are raising alarms about America's energy infrastructure's ability to support AI's rapid growth.  Massive investments in AI data centers are straining power supplies, prompting tech giants to pledge to cover their own energy costs and explore diverse power sources, including advanced nuclear.

title: H-1B visa registrations dip 30-50%: List of cos emerging as ‘favourites’ in new system
content: H-1B visa registrations for FY27 have plummeted by 30-50%, driven by higher fees and a new lottery prioritizing wages. This shift benefits mid-tier IT firms and US Master's graduates, while large outsourcing companies face reduced dominance. The recalibration signals a move towards quality talent and increased costs for employers.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office Day 6: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 650 cr India gross milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its historic dominance at the box office, amassing a staggering Rs. 844.76 crore in worldwide gross collections. This global haul is fueled by a robust Rs. 619.76 crore from the domestic Indian market and a powerful Rs. 225.00 crore from overseas territories. Currently, the high-octane sequel has already secured a domestic net collection of Rs. 519.12 crore, firmly establishing it as one of the fastest Indian films to reach these elite milestones.

title: All about the actor who played Shirani Baloch in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'
content: Aditya Dhar's spy thriller storms box office with Ranveer Singh, Arjun Rampal. Bimal Oberoi, actor-producer (PK, Tiger 3), plays radical leader inspired by Maulana Shirani & Akbar Bugti. Short but powerful role adds tension.

title: Mark Zuckerberg makes more high-profile hirings for Meta's AI unit
content: Meta Platforms has acquired the core team of AI startup Dreamer, including co-founder Hugo Barra, a former Meta executive. This move bolsters Meta's Superintelligence Labs, aiming to develop autonomous AI agents for personalized user tasks. The deal signals Meta's aggressive push into AI infrastructure, following substantial investments in the sector.

title: 'Kantara' controversy row: Ranveer ready to submit affidavit of apology in court
content: Ranveer Singh has offered an unconditional apology to the Karnataka High Court regarding his imitation of a ritual from 'Kantara Chapter 1', which had drawn criticism for hurting religious sentiments. The court, however, orally observed the imitation was inappropriate, with a judge emphasizing the responsibility of superstars. The actor had previously apologized on social media for his actions.

title: Who is Ryan Williams? Australia-born footballer likely to play for India
content: The Australian-born forward was included after FIFA approved his change of association, allowing him to represent India at the senior level. He had earlier been part of the preparatory camp for the Bangladesh qualifier but could not make the squad due to pending paperwork.

title: ‘Don’t just say ED, ED, ED’: SC questions Bengal govt in Mamata I-PAC raid case
content: The Supreme Court questioned West Bengal's objection to the ED's plea alleging obstruction by Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee during a raid. Justices emphasized the fundamental rights of individual ED officers, urging the state to focus on their alleged victimhood rather than just the agency.

title: When will Iran's regime fall? Here's what Mossad chief said
content: Mossad chief David Barnea reportedly presented a nuanced view on Iran's regime change, suggesting it was possible but likely a year-long process, not a swift collapse. This assessment, emphasizing conditions and time, contrasts with claims of expecting rapid uprisings. Recent statements indicate the Iranian regime remains intact but weakened.

title: After Shanaka & Blessing, third foreign player leaves PSL, is he CSK bound?
content: The 33-year-old right-arm fast bowler withdrew from the PSL last week, and Pakistani news outlet Geo Super reported on Tuesday that the PSL franchise Hyderabad Kingsmen are weighing up their options to replace Baartman.

title: Harish Rana, India's first passive euthanasia case, dies after 13 years in vegetative state
content: India's first passive euthanasia recipient, Harish Rana, passed away at AIIMS-Delhi after 13 years in a vegetative state. The Supreme Court had permitted the withdrawal of life support, allowing a dignified end. This case reignited the debate on 'letting a patient die' versus actively ending life, highlighting the legal and ethical complexities surrounding end-of-life decisions.

title: Alcohol, betrayal and more: How ‘lover’ plotted murder in UP, beheads Delhi woman
content: A Delhi woman, Babli Devi, was brutally murdered in Bulandshahr. Police discovered her body near a canal. Her lover, Vikas, and two others allegedly beheaded her. Babli's family identified her through a social media post. Vikas, who had a relationship with Babli after her husband's death, is the prime accused. He has been arrested along with an accomplice.

title: Sunrise and Sunset Time on March 25, 2026; Powerful remedies to appease Lord Surya
content: On March 25, 2026, in New Delhi, sunrise is at 6:21 AM and sunset at 6:34 PM. To embrace auspiciousness and divine energy, wake early for a holy bath and offer water to Lord Surya using a copper vessel. Seek your father's blessings, perform Surya Namaskar, and chant powerful mantras to enhance spiritual power and vitality.

title: PM Modi compares fuel crisis to Covid-19 in Parl; Rahul says 'don't forget the deaths'
content: Rahul Gandhi criticized PM Modi's comparison of the current fuel crisis to the Covid-19 pandemic, highlighting the tragic loss of life during the pandemic. He also accused Modi of compromising India's foreign policy and questioned the government's handling of the West Asia conflict and the stranded Indian ships.

title: Who is Kal Somani? The US entrepreneur leading $1.63bn RR buy
content: Ahead of IPL 2026, Rajasthan Royals have been acquired for $1.63 billion by a consortium led by US entrepreneur Kal Somani, making it a landmark deal. Somani, a tech entrepreneur, is backed by major global investors like Rob Walton and Sheila Ford Hamp. The move highlights growing IPL value, with Somani expressing strong belief in the league’s future potential.

title: R Madhavan clarifies after FIR over Dhurandhar 2, says he put out cigarette
content: A controversy erupted over a scene in 'Dhurandhar 2' featuring R Madhavan and Ranveer Singh, with a Shiv Sena leader filing an FIR for alleged disrespect to Gurbani. Madhavan has since clarified, stating the scene was misunderstood and that he extinguished his cigarette before reciting sacred lines, emphasizing respect for the Sikh community.

title: Kashmiri separatist Asiya Andrabi gets life imprisonment in UAPA case
content: Kashmiri separatist leader Asiya Andrabi has been sentenced to life imprisonment by a Delhi court under the UAPA. Her associates, Fehmeeda and Nasreen, received 30-year sentences in the same case. The convictions stem from charges including waging war against India and promoting enmity.

title: Kal Somani-led consortium buys Rajasthan Royals for $1.63 billion
content: US entrepreneur Kal Somani, backed by the Walton and Hamp families, has secured ownership of the Rajasthan Royals franchise for $1.63 billion. This significant acquisition marks a new chapter for the IPL team.

title: Ram Navami 2026: Date set for March 27; madhyahna muhurat 11:13 AM–1:41 PM
content: Ram Navami, celebrating the birth of Lord Shri Ram, the seventh incarnation of Lord Vishnu, will be observed on March 26, 2026. This prominent Hindu festival marks the end of Chaitra Navratri and is observed with prayers, recitations of Ramacharitmanas, and acts of charity, honoring Lord Rama's ideals of morality, truth, and justice.

title: From cheapest to one of the costliest: RR sees 2,332.84% jump in value in 19 years
content: Rajasthan Royals’ valuation has surged from $67 million in 2008 to $1.63 billion in 2026, marking a 2,332.84 percent rise. Once the cheapest IPL franchise, they are now among the most valuable, reflecting the league’s explosive financial growth and strong investor interest.

title: Electric bus powered by diesel! Here's why this video is going viral
content: A viral video shows an electric bus charging via a diesel generator, raising questions about the environmental benefits of EVs when their power source isn't clean. This highlights a critical gap in charging infrastructure and the need for renewable energy to make electric mobility truly sustainable.

title: 'Modi may not be PM by 2026 end': Arvind Kejriwal at Sanjay Raut book launch
content: Arvind Kejriwal predicted Prime Minister Narendra Modi might not remain in office beyond 2026, citing a decline in popularity and alleged electoral "corruption." Opposition leaders at a book launch echoed concerns about institutions like the EC and ED, with Derek O’Brien predicting electoral defeats for the BJP.

title: 'Universal joke': Rahul Gandhi on PM Modi's foreign policy, says he's 'compromised'
content: Rahul Gandhi has sharply criticized Prime Minister Modi's foreign policy, labeling it a "personal" and "universal joke," and suggesting Modi is "compromised" by US President Trump. Gandhi also voiced concerns over rising LPG and fuel prices, warning of public suffering and questioning the Prime Minister's handling of the situation, contrasting it with the Covid-19 pandemic's tragedies.

title: How much oil does India have? PM Modi explains nation’s preparedness amid global fuel crisis
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi assured India of sufficient crude oil storage and uninterrupted supply amidst the West Asia war's global fuel crunch. He highlighted the nation's strategic oil reserves and increased refining capacity, while emphasizing India's commitment to peace through dialogue and diplomacy in the region.

title: 392 drones and 34 missiles: Russian strikes on Ukraine disrupt key European power route
content: Russia unleashed a significant overnight assault, deploying hundreds of drones and missiles across Ukraine, resulting in at least five fatalities and widespread damage. Critical energy infrastructure was hit, impacting power links to Europe. This escalation follows Ukrainian warnings of impending large-scale attacks, with both nations reporting intensified cross-border strikes recently.

title: Madras high court to hear PIL to stall screening of 'Dhurandhar 2' until Tamil Nadu polls
content: A Public Interest Litigation has been filed in the Madras High Court seeking to halt the screening of the film 'Dhurandhar 2' in Tamil Nadu. The petitioner argues that the movie's political content violates the ongoing Model Code of Conduct. The court, acknowledging the film's release, advised the petitioner to file a formal writ petition for consideration.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chiefs eye reunion with $1.5M Super Bowl champ amid concerns
content: The Kansas City Chiefs are evaluating options to fix their weakened secondary after key departures in free agency. A potential reunion with a familiar veteran has emerged as a short-term solution, though concerns about age and injuries remain. With strong draft capital available, the team may prioritize younger talent while keeping experienced depth as a backup option.

title: Massive blow! RCB star ruled out of IPL 2026
content: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru will be without fast bowler Yash Dayal for IPL 2026 due to personal reasons. Director of Cricket Mo Bobat confirmed Dayal remains under contract and will receive continued support from the franchise during this challenging period. Dayal was a key bowler for RCB, contributing significantly to their 2024 playoff run and 2025 title win.

title: TGCET result 2026 out today: check Gurukul CET scorecard
content: Telangana Gurukul Common Entrance Test (TGCET) 2026 results were released today, March 24, for Class 5 to 9 admissions. Students can check their scores, ranks, and qualifying status online at tgcet.cgg.gov.in. The next steps involve certificate verification, counselling, and seat allotment based on merit.

title: Centre calls for all-party meeting amid escalating West Asia tensions
content: Amid escalating West Asia tensions and reports of an LPG crisis, the government convened an all-party meeting. Opposition leaders voiced concerns over the handling of the conflict and its impact on India's energy security. Prime Minister Modi is set to address Parliament on the economic and security implications, while defence officials reviewed preparedness

title: Predicting Rounds 1-2 of the NFL draft: Yates finds landing spots for 64 top prospects
content: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?

title: Meet the 'Tokyo Toe' -- the NFL draft's most interesting kicker prospect
content: After learning how to kick and teaching himself English, Kansei Matsuzawa's dream is nearing reality.

title: Arkansas' Acuff lands historic Reebok shoe deal
content: Arkansas star Darius Acuff Jr. has landed a signature shoe with Reebok, becoming the first NCAA men's athlete to receive one with a major U.S. brand while still in college, head of basketball at Reebok, Jide Osifeso, tells ESPN.

title: Tiger to return with Jupiter's TGL season on line
content: Tiger Woods told ESPN that he will play in Match 2 of the best-of-three TGL finals, a decision he publicized after Jupiter Links lost a 6-5 nail-biter to Los Angeles in the opener Monday night in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida.

title: Cuse women's HC blasts NCAA for UConn pairing
content: Syracuse coach Felisha Legette-Jack blasted the NCAA women's basketball committee for consistently putting her teams in the UConn subregional in Storrs following the Orange's 98-45 second-round loss to the Huskies.

title: Texas rookie gets mound visit, told he made team
content: The mound visit Carter Baumler received from Rangers manager Skip Schumaker on Monday night wasn't to take the rookie right-hander out of his last spring training game, but rather to let him know he made the Opening Day roster.

title: Shiffrin's slalom win puts her in line for WC title
content: Mikaela Shiffrin won slalom Tuesday, but the World Cup overall title will be decided in the season-ending race Wednesday.

title: Amputee cornhole player faces murder charges
content: A county sheriff's office in Maryland said Monday that a professional cornhole player who's also a quadruple amputee fatally shot a passenger in the front seat of a car he was driving during an argument.

content: The best stars in MLS make already-good teams better. With Orlando, Griezmann will be joining a rebuild.

content: Angel City and the Houston Dash are quickly making their way to the top of ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, but their rise isn't enough to make them No. 1.

title: ₹180 cr. Budget allocation to improve cardiac care: Dr. Sadanand
content: The Chief Minister has announced an allocation of ₹180 crore in the State Budget this year to add 200 more beds to Jayadeva hospital

title: Nitish Kumar elected unopposed as JD(U) national president
content: He was the only candidate to file his nomination for the post; as Mr. Kumar was busy inaugurating projects in Bihar in his last days as CM, JD(U) leaders received the poll certificate on his behalf in Delhi

title: Tourism sector emerging as key growth engine for development of A.P., says Minister
content: Kandula Durgesh instructs officials to complete the ‘Akhanda Godavari’ project before the Godavari Pushkaralu, emphasising the need for innovative decisions to increase tourist footfall

title: Only 5% of households received mandated 100 days of employment under MGNREGA: CAG report
content: The report highlighted irregularities in contract management, stating that outsourcing contracts were extended without fresh tenders, leading to higher service charges.

title: Khandre visits home of trainee vet killed in hippo attack, pays tribute
content: He further noted that a high-level inquiry has been ordered and further will be taken after receiving the investigation report.

title: PM Modi, U.S. President Trump discuss West Asia crisis; focus on keeping Strait of Hormuz open for shipping
content: The call was initiated by the U.S. President, a day after he extended Washington's deadline by five days for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz

content: Seeks details on how the fire spread rapidly and directs authorities to use forensic evidence to determine the exact cause

title: A.P. targets supplying safe drinking water to every household by 2028, says CM
content: State signs MoU with Centre for implementation of Jal Jeevan Mission 2.0; Priority is given to operation and maintenance of rural drinking water supply systems, says Naidu

title: Mizoram CM says he acquired land near key project sites at the behest of locals facing hardships
content: Youth Congress president Laltawnliana claimed that Lalduhoma acquired the land in early 2024 from multiple landowners, and also purchased land parcels in Kanghmun South

title: Guntur launches drive to eliminate begging
content: GMC Commissioner says that the drive is not merely an enforcement exercise, but will focus on rehabilitation and ensuring that each person is provided with opportunities to lead a dignified life

title: Karnataka high Court flags systemic delay in government litigation, orders reforms
content: Kalaburagi Bench dismisses 321-day delayed plea in typist grant-in-aid case; directs digital tracking of cases and fixed timelines for appeals

title: ECI reviews preparedness, law-and-order in poll-bound States
content: Central agencies told to step up seizures of illegal cash, liquor, narcotics, and arms in poll-bound States; in 12 neighbouring States, special focus on sealing of borders to maintain peace and order

title: No shortage of petrol, diesel or LPG in Telangana, says Civil Supplies dept
content: Panic buying leading to ‘no stock’ boards; Hyderabad Police Commissioner too says there is no fuel shortage

content: All three fronts set to begin holding public meetings across the district; CM to visit four constituencies on Wednesday; senior leaders expected to lead campaign for Congress

content: Modernisation work has been undertaken at 90 AYUSH centres, while new AYUSH health centres are being constructed in 60 government hospitals, says Sartya Kumar Yadav

title: President's Office Again Snubs Trinamool's Meeting Request Over Protocol Row
content: The developments follow a recent row during the president's visit to West Bengal earlier this month, where she expressed displeasure over how the state administration handled a tribal conclave and protocol issues.

content: In a televised interview on Tuesday on Iran's state-funded news agency IRNA, Mohsen Rezaei, Iran's new military adviser said, "The final deadlines for saving America are approaching."

title: Centre May Delay Bills On Women's Quota, Not Table Them This Session: Sources
content: The government has indicated that a special session could be convened specifically for the Women's Reservation Bill, or alternatively, its introduction could be considered during the Monsoon Session, sources said

content: Sensex, Nifty50, Share Prices Today LIVE: Oil prices cooled down after Donald Trump announced a 5-day pause in attacks on Iranian energy sites.

title: Breaking down the men's hockey tournament: Who will make it to Vegas?

Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

title: Welcome to WNBA chaos: Breaking down a chock-full offseason
content: the WNBA and women's national basketball players association agree to a new collective bargaining agreement . the agreement gives way to what both sides have described as a "transformational" deal . despite months of negotiations to reach this point, the previous CBA expired in October .

title: 'A litmus test for the system': $50 million rosters and Nebraska's big challenge
content: the house settlement established a set of rules for paying players . it was intended to prevent the top programs from spending at a pace that made it impossible for the 100-plus other schools to compete . but those top programs have aggressively pursued loopholes to build rosters that are often worth double the money schools are allowed to share directly with their players. now, those rules are facing their first real test .

title: Ranking the best possible Stanley Cup playoff first-round matchups
content: if things stay the way they are right now, we will have a ton of turnover from last season . the Buffalo Sabres, Pittsburgh Penguins, Columbus Blue Jackets, Boston Bruins, Detroit Red Wings, Anaheim Ducks , Utah Mammoth and Nashville Predators are all ready for the postseason .

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .

title: Barnwell on a surprising NFL free agency trend going back to 2013
content: 'the bill Barnwell Show' today, I'll try to answer that question . how often does a team sign a significant free agent, look back and say that it spent wisely? how often do premium free agents really work out?

title: Men's tournament first bets: Picks to make now for the next two rounds
content: the men's basketball tournament field has been whittled down to just 16 teams . three of the four no. 1 seeds ( Duke , Arizona and Michigan ) are still in competition . top-seeded Florida got knocked out after a single-point victory by Iowa .

title: Ranking each NHL team's top prospect: Hagens, Iginla, Martone, more
content: every NHL franchise has a prospect pool because of a lack of draft capital . some players are polished and NHL-ready, producing at high rates in other leagues, while others are early in their development with a high ceiling . the player must be under 23 and not an established NHL player .

title: Ready for Opening Day? Here's your guide to the offseason chaos that rocked MLB
content: the new york Mets signed the offseason's no. 1 free agent to a record deal . the two-time reigning champion los Angeles Dodgers sent shock waves through the sport . if you know every signing and trade and still aren't quite sure what to make of the chaos, we've got you covered .

title: From Arizona to Texas: Ranking the men's Sweet 16 teams
content: alvaro Folgueiras sinks a 3-pointer in the final seconds as Iowa takes down the defending champions . this is the second straight year the Sweet 16 is made up of only major conference schools . the top of the list is where it gets more complicated .

title: Men's Sweet 16 preview: Keys to every team advancing in the NCAA tournament
content: college basketball reporters break down what could decide each game in the next round of the 2026 men's NCAA tournament . the hottest team in the field, winning three games in five days to go from the first four to the Sweet 16 .

title: Wemby states MVP case: Want to leave no debate
content: wembanyama is averaging 24.3 points, 11.2 rebounds, 3.0 assists and 3.0 blocked shots . he wants to win the NBA's most Valuable Player Award this season . only six players have finished a season with such numbers .

title: McCarthy: Rodgers reunion would be 'great story'
content: Aaron Rodgers will return to Pittsburgh next season to be the Steelers' starting quarterback . the new coach is well aware of the kind of story it would be . "yes, it'd be a great story," McCarthy said Monday .

title: Men's March Madness Pain Index: Whose tournament loss hurt most?
content: a team that walks off the court stunned, jerseys and towels covering tears . a fan base with high expectations and disappointment about the early exit is behind every one of those heartbroken teams . every team's exit is categorized into one of the most devastating .

title: Women's March Madness Day 4 takeaways: How every team reached the Sweet 16
content: the final day of the second round of the 2026 women's NCAA tournament is underway . we're tracking every game as the regional semifinals take shape . the three no. 1 seeds moved on easily, but there was plenty of intrigue elsewhere .
